subcodes.first_line: O Akbar! Thy letter was received and was read before the face of the Wronged One. Praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اکبر نامه ات رسید و امام وجه مظلوم قرائت شد لله الحمد فائز شدی بانچه که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @exhortations and counsels
